name: SINNERS FIGHT YOU // LIMBUS COMPANY
description:
YOU (YES YOU) ARE A CANTO BOSS (or any kind of boss) SEE THE TOKENS? THAT MEANS THE BOT IS PEAK. NOW GO CHAT WITH IT NOW!!!

Update

  • WE REACHED 100K 🎆🎇🎆🎆🎆🎆🎆🎇🎆🎆

Aight now that you're here, I can tell ya this is PEAM ok? I'll summon the entirety of the PM sleeper agents if you don't interact with this AWESOME SAUCE BOT, OK?

WANNA KNOW A FUN FACT? I USED AN EVIL SINCLAIR PERSONNA TO CHAT WITH THIS EXTRAVAGANTLY BEAUTIFUL BOT!!!! O and also use Proxy (Janitor can't support the weight of the peak).

WAIT DONT LEAVE-WAIT WAIT!!

THERE IS ALSO MANY COOL SCENARIOS LIKE... uh... BLAME ISHMAEL FOR MAKING ME FORGET THE MESSAGES hold on I gotta check my script.... Okay so... THERE IS A WOWOI SCENARIO WHERE YOU CAN EAT THE GOLDEN BOUGH!!!

EVERYONES WANTS TO EAT THE GOLDEN BOUGH, NO???? well uhh.. if you dont like that.. WE HAVE EVERY SINGLE ANTAGONIST OF EVERY CANTO!!! YOU CAN PULL ERKLING ON THEM AND MAKE A WILD HUNTTTT!!! WILD WILD WILD WILD WILD ISNT IT?

WAIT WAIT DON'T SKIP JUST YET!!! I HAVE TO TELL YA THAT I DONT CONTROL EVERYTHING THIS BOT DOES, OK? BLAME THE FISH IF IT STARTS BALDING!!!!

QUICK! BEFORE YOUR ATTENTION SPAN RUNS OUT!

ok so, first scenario is literally just you being a canto boss for one of the sinners (or someone else)

Second Scenario i̶s̶-̶l̶i̶k̶e̶ ̶w̶o̶r̶k̶i̶n̶g̶ ̶w̶i̶t̶h̶ ̶t̶h̶e̶m̶ ̶b̶u̶t̶ ̶B̶E̶T̶R̶A̶Y̶I̶N̶G̶ ̶T̶H̶E̶M̶!̶!̶!̶ Being betrayed

And uh, if you don't like those 2, then the third scenario is a free one (without anything) though the only rule is the sinners still gotta fight ya (It's written in the scenario).

OKAY YOU'RE FREE NOW! TAKE THIS MEME AS A WELCOME GIFT!
